# Etienne Lorthoy

> Senior Full-Stack and Performance Developer in Montreal. Solo developer of Hard Chip, a 3D digital logic simulation game on Steam.

- Personal/freelance site: https://etiennelorthoy.com
- Hard Chip game: https://hardchip.io
- Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2844290/Hard_Chip/
- GitHub: https://github.com/EtienneLorthoy
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/etienne-lorthoy
